title: Understand: sexual reproduction and genetic variation
description: Check your understanding of sexual reproduction and genetic variation in this set of free practice questions aligned to NGSS standards.
topic_path: Understand: sexual reproduction and genetic variation

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which statement is true about a diploid organism?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: It has two sets of chromosomes in each cell.
It has one set of chromosomes in each cell.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Choose the best phrase to fill in the blank.**

>A diploid organism has \_\_\_\_\_\_ in each cell.

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: two sets of chromosomes
one set of chromosomes

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which term best describes a gamete with one complete set of chromosomes?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: haploid
diploid

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which statement best describes what happens during fertilization?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Two haploid gametes fuse to form a diploid organism.
Two diploid gametes fuse to form a haploid organism.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Determine if the statement below is true or false.**

>During fertilization, two diploid gametes fuse to form a haploid organism.

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: true
false

assessment_items.question_content:
**Determine if the statement below is true or false.**

>During fertilization, two haploid gametes fuse to form a diploid organism.

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: true
false

assessment_items.question_content:
**Why does sexual reproduction lead to genetic variation between parents and offspring?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Offspring receive a mixture of alleles from two parents.
Offspring receive all of their alleles from a single parent.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Choose the best phrase to fill in the blank.**

>Sexual reproduction leads to genetic variation because \_\_\_\_\_\_.

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: offspring receive a mixture of alleles from two parents
offspring receive all of their alleles from a single parent

assessment_items.question_content:
**Why does sexual reproduction lead to genetic variation between parents and offspring?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Offspring get half of their genes from one parent, and half from the other.
Offspring get all of their genes from one parent.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Choose the best word to fill in the blank.**

>In sexual reproduction, a parent passes on \_\_\_\_\_\_ of its chromosomes to each offspring.

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: half
all

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which statement about sexual reproduction is true?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: A parent passes on half of its chromosomes to each offspring.
A parent passes on all of its chromosomes to each offspring.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Determine if the statement below is true or false.**

>In sexual reproduction, a parent passes on all of its chromosomes to each offspring.

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: true
false
